mapper.select:
select A.STCD,A.TM,UPZ,DWZ,TGTQ,SWCHRCD,SUPWPTN,SDWWPTN,MSQMT,INTM from ST_WAS_R as A inner join ( select STCD,MAX(TM) TM from ST_WAS_R
and TM >= to_date(#{stime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and TM <= to_date(#{etime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
group by STCD ) as B on A.STCD = B.STCD and A.TM = B.TM
and A.STCD in
#{stcd}

select * from ST_WAS_R
and STCD in
#{stcd}
and TM >= to_date(#{stime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and TM <= to_date(#{etime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
